hero.title: Web Design & SEO Agency
hero.subtitle: Your business, seen.
hero.description: NJ & NY web design for Korean-American businesses. SEO that ranks. Ads that convert. Websites that shine.

about.title: Why Small Businesses Choose Us
about.subtitle: We understand you're busy running your business. That's why we make everything simple.

design.title: Done For You
design.description: No need to learn complicated tools. We handle everything from start to finish.

development.title: Results in 30 Days
development.description: See real customers coming to your business within the first month.

performance.title: Affordable Pricing
performance.description: Plans designed for small business budgets. No hidden fees, no surprises.

mobile.title: 24/7 Support
mobile.description: Questions? We're here to help. Real people, not robots.

services.title: Web Design & Development — Built to Be Found
services.subtitle: We design, build, and grow your online presence. Modern websites that rank on Google and convert visitors into customers.

seo.title: SEO & GEO — Get Found Everywhere
seo.description: We optimize your site so customers find you on Google, AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity), and everywhere else. No jargon — just results.
seo.benefit: Customers find you, not your competitors

googleAds.title: Google & Yelp Ads
googleAds.description: Put your business in front of customers on Google and Yelp right when they're looking for what you offer.

webDesign.title: Shopify Expert Builds
webDesign.description: We're a Shopify Expert + Korean-American studio. Custom Shopify, Next.js, or Squarespace builds for restaurants, beauty, medical, e-commerce, and more. The TJ Flowers Shopify rebuild (Manhattan florist) hit 5× search visibility in 6 weeks.
features: Shopify Expert — themes, apps, custom Liquid
SEO + AI-search ready from day one

takeover.title: Takeover My Existing Site
takeover.description: Already have a Shopify, WordPress, Squarespace, or OpenCart site you're tired of paying for? We take it over — fix what's broken, cut what you don't need, modernize what's worth keeping. No full rebuild required.
features: Audit your current Shopify / WordPress / Squarespace stack
Cancel apps you don't need — save $200–800/mo
Fix performance, SEO, and checkout funnel leaks
Take over your existing agency contract
Keep your Google rankings + customer data intact
takeover.benefit: Lower monthly costs, better performance — without rebuilding

costAudit.title: Shopify & SaaS Cost Audit
costAudit.description: Most Korean SMB owners overpay $200–$800/month on Shopify apps, marketing tools, and SaaS subscriptions that don't drive revenue. We audit your entire stack and cut what's not working — guaranteed savings or it's free.
features: Cancel apps blocking your checkout speed
costAudit.benefit: Save more in 30 days than the audit costs

socialMedia.title: Social Media Management
socialMedia.description: We post for you. You don't need to know anything about social media — just focus on running your business while we grow your online presence.
socialMedia.benefit: Stay visible without lifting a finger

revamp.title: Website Revamp & Migration
revamp.description: Still on OpenCart, old WordPress, or a slow outdated site? We migrate and modernize your website to any platform you want — fast and clean. TJ Flowers came off OpenCart and hit 5× search visibility in 6 weeks.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Ready to bring your ideas to life? Get in touch and let's create something amazing.
